description_long: This is a large, circular chandelier with eight evenly spaced, trumpet-shaped lamp shades arranged around a central axis. The shades are ribbed and flare outward, giving a floral or Art Deco appearance. The structure is supported by a central rod that extends upward, wrapped in a decorative, ruched covering, likely fabric or faux leather. The arms connecting the shades to the central hub are slender and arranged in a geometric, crisscross pattern, providing both support and visual interest. The overall finish appears to be a matte or semi-gloss white, contributing to a clean, modern aesthetic. This fixture is designed to be suspended from the ceiling, making it suitable for large indoor spaces such as lobbies, halls, or upscale urban interiors.
description: A circular chandelier with eight trumpet-shaped, ribbed lamp shades and a decorative central suspension rod, finished in matte white. The geometric armature and floral-inspired shades give it a modern, elegant look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full circular arrangement of eight flared lamp shades and the central suspension rod.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the paired alignment of the shades and the crisscrossing support arms.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually similar to the front, with all eight shades and the central rod visible.
description_view_3: Side view mirroring view 1, showing the paired shades and geometric support structure.
